spec.title: percentile response times (get recent messages endpoint, 200 OK)

spec.expr: histogram_quantile(0.99, sum by(le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance="$instance", job="$job", status_code="200", method="GET", endpoint=~`/api/v2/recent-messages/({channel_login}|:channel_login)`}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.95, sum by(le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance="$instance", job="$job", status_code="200", method="GET", endpoint=~`/api/v2/recent-messages/({channel_login}|:channel_login)`}[$__rate_interval])))

histogram_quantile(0.5, sum by(le) (rate(http_request_duration_seconds_bucket{instance="$instance", job="$job", status_code="200", method="GET", endpoint=~`/api/v2/recent-messages/({channel_login}|:channel_login)`}[$__rate_interval])))

spec.title: Increase/Decrease on number of messages stored

spec.legendFormat: System - Processes executing in kernel mode
User - Normal processes executing in user mode
Nice - Niced processes executing in user mode
Iowait - Waiting for I/O to complete
Steal - Time spent in other operating systems when running in a virtualized environment
Guest - Time spent running a virtual CPU for a guest operating system
Idle - Waiting for something to happen

matcher.options: Idle - Waiting for something to happen
Nice - Niced processes executing in user mode
Steal - Time spent in other operating systems when running in a virtualized environment
System - Processes executing in kernel mode
User - Normal processes executing in user mode

Time taken to forward a message internally to the chunk worker
